Description: Sign up via email/password or Social Login (Google, Facebook, Apple ID)
One-time password via email/SMS for registration and critical actions (e.g. password reset)
Update name, profile picture, contact details, notification preferences
Set home region/city/postal code to personalize feed
Step-by-step form: title, description, brand/model, category, condition tags
Drag-and-drop upload of up to 5 photos per listing
Specify pickup rules (self-pickup, needs truck, weekend-only, etc.)
Toggle listing status: Available, Reserved, Donated, Archived
Main feed prioritizing listings near the user's set region
Filter by region/distance, category, and condition
Keyword search with auto-suggestions for appliance types
Bookmark listings to revisit or request later
"Request Item" button prompting a note to the owner (reason/pickup timing)
Text-only chat unlocked after a request, hides personal contact info
Donor marks "Gifted to [User]" to close and log the transaction
"Report" button on posts/profiles for scams, spam, or inappropriate content
